name: Content Creator
description: Multi-platform content creation agent for LinkedIn posts/articles, personal blog writing for omarbakri.com, personal newsletter writing for intelligentrails.news, and X/Twitter. Orchestrates the full pipeline: Strategy, Research, Draft, Polish, Publish.

connections.name: ghost
connections.key_format: <24-hex-id>:<64-hex-secret> — obtain from Ghost Admin → Settings → Integrations (Admin API key, NOT Content API key)

steps.name: Health Check
steps.description: Verify state manager and database connectivity before content creation pipeline

steps.description: Register content_creator agent with state manager (idempotent, first run only)

steps.name: Pre-Session State Load
steps.description: Load session state: recent posts, agent messages, memories, content performance history, ICP rotation schedule

actions.description: Load session state from state manager
Retrieve inter-agent messages (POST_PUBLISHED, METRICS, etc.)
Recall content performance memories and audience insights
Load content creation knowledge base

steps.name: Setup Workspace & ICP Rotation
steps.description: Create working directories, determine today's ICP lane from rotation schedule, check shared intel from other agents

actions.description: Create temp working directories for content pipeline
Check for prospect signals from LinkedIn/Outlook agents for content inspiration
Determine today's ICP lane from weekly rotation: Mon=B(Payments), Tue=C(Partnerships), Wed=A(Treasury), Thu=D(Technical), Fri=C(Partnerships). Lane E(Compliance) rotates in every other Wednesday.

outputs.todays_icp_lane: ICP lane letter (A-E) based on day of week rotation
outputs.icp_rotation_schedule: Mon=B(Marcus/Payments), Tue=C(Sofia/Partnerships), Wed=A(Karim/Treasury), Thu=D(Raj/Technical), Fri=C(Sofia/Partnerships), Lane E(Hannah/Compliance) every other Wed

steps.name: Phase 1: Strategy
steps.description: Determine what content to create: platform, format, ICP lane, content pillar, buyer stage. Use content-strategy and brainstorming skills. Output: prioritized list of content pieces with platform, format, and angle.

actions.description: Invoke content-strategy skill for topic clusters, pillars, keyword mapping
Invoke brainstorming skill for ideation when exploring angles
Apply marketing psychology for engagement triggers (curiosity gap, social proof, loss aversion)

outputs.content_plan: Prioritized list of content pieces with platform, format, ICP lane, pillar, buyer stage, and angle
outputs.strategy_output: Topic clusters and keyword mapping from content-strategy skill

steps.name: Phase 2: Research
steps.description: Gather supporting data, examples, trending context, and competitor insights. Uses Tavily, Exa, x-twitter-scraper, competitor analysis, and SEO research tools.

actions.description: Broad web research via Tavily for trending topics and supporting data
Deep semantic research via Exa for content discovery and competitor analysis
Search X/Twitter for trending topics and engagement patterns via Xquik
Competitive content gap analysis via marketing-skills:competitor-alternatives
Keyword research and search intent analysis via marketing-skills:ai-seo

outputs.research_brief: Research brief with key data points, quotes, angles, competitor gaps, and SEO keywords

steps.name: Phase 3: Draft LinkedIn Post
steps.description: Create LinkedIn post with 2-line hook (~55 chars each), body paragraphs, specific CTA question, and 1080x1350 AI-generated image. No hashtags, no emojis in copy. Links go in first comment only.

actions.description: Invoke linkedin-growth-engine workflow for LinkedIn-specific post creation
Apply proven hook frameworks and persuasion copy via marketing-skills:copywriting

Generate 1080x1350 (4:5) image. Use Imagen for editorial/illustrative images (no text). Use PIL for announcement posts, teasers, and branded images with text overlays. Select method based on content_type: 'editorial'→Imagen, 'teaser'|'announcement'|'branded'→PIL.

config.command: python -c "from google import genai; client = genai.Client(); response = client.models.generate_images(model='imagen-4.0-fast-generate-001', prompt='{{image_prompt}}', config=genai.types.GenerateImagesConfig(number_of_images=1, aspect_ratio='3:4', output_mime_type='image/png')); response.generated_images[0].image.save('/tmp/content-ops/images/linkedin-post.png')"
config.command_imagen: python -c "from google import genai; client = genai.Client(); response = client.models.generate_images(model='imagen-4.0-fast-generate-001', prompt='{{image_prompt}}', config=genai.types.GenerateImagesConfig(number_of_images=1, aspect_ratio='3:4', output_mime_type='image/png')); response.generated_images[0].image.save('/tmp/content-ops/images/linkedin-post.png')"
config.command_pil:
python -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; import textwrap
img = Image.new('RGB', (1080, 1350), '#0A0A0A'); draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
draw.rectangle([(80, 120), (180, 128)], fill='#00D4FF')
try:
  fh = ImageFont.truetype('/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf', 72)
  fs = ImageFont.truetype('/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf', 38)
  fb = ImageFont.truetype('/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf', 28)
except: fh = fs = fb = ImageFont.load_default()
y = 180
for line in textwrap.wrap('{{image_headline}}', width=20): draw.text((80, y), line, font=fh, fill='#FFFFFF'); y += 90
y += 40
for line in textwrap.wrap('{{image_subtext}}', width=42): draw.text((80, y), line, font=fs, fill='#CCCCCC'); y += 52
draw.rectangle([(0, 1250), (1080, 1350)], fill='#111111'); draw.text((80, 1285), 'TheGent', font=fb, fill='#00D4FF')
clean = Image.new(img.mode, img.size); clean.putdata(list(img.getdata())); clean.save('/tmp/content-ops/images/linkedin-post.png')
"

actions.description: Strip all AI-generated metadata from image before upload (EXIF, XMP, IPTC). Critical to avoid platform detection.

config.command: python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open('/tmp/content-ops/images/linkedin-post.png'); clean = Image.new(img.mode, img.size); clean.putdata(list(img.getdata())); clean.save('/tmp/content-ops/images/linkedin-post-clean.png')"

steps.description: Run all drafts through humanizer skill to remove 24 known AI writing patterns: filler phrases, hedging, purple prose, over-structuring, sycophantic openers.

steps.description: Run all drafts through writing-clearly-and-concisely skill. Checks: unnecessary words, passive voice, jargon, sentence length variation, reading level.

steps.name: Phase 4: Quick Self-Check
steps.description: Apply 5-point self-check to every piece: (1) Reader test — remove your name, still valuable? (2) Hook test — first 2 lines, would you click see more? (3) CTA test — action is clear? (4) AI pattern test — sounds human? (5) Conciseness test — shortest version?

actions.description: Sub-agent runs the 5-point self-check on all polished drafts

config.prompt:
Run the 5-point self-check on all polished drafts:
1. READER TEST: Remove creator's name. Is it still valuable?
2. HOOK TEST: Read only the first 2 lines. Would you click 'see more'?
3. CTA TEST: What action should the reader take? Is it clear?
4. AI PATTERN TEST: Does this sound like a human wrote it?
5. CONCISENESS TEST: Is this the shortest version that conveys the full message?
For each draft, return pass/fail per check and suggested fixes for failures.

post.message: One or more drafts failed the self-check — flagging for review

steps.name: Phase 4.5: Approval
steps.description: Present all polished drafts to Omar for approval, editing, or rejection before publishing

actions.description: Present each polished draft to Omar with platform, format, ICP lane, and quality gate results

config.approval_prompt:
For each polished draft, present:
- PLATFORM (LinkedIn / X/Twitter / Blog / Newsletter)
- FORMAT (post / carousel / tweet / thread / article / newsletter)
- ICP LANE (A-E) and persona name
- CONTENT PILLAR
- HOOK (first 2 lines)
- FULL DRAFT
- IMAGE (if applicable)
- QUALITY GATE RESULTS (humanizer, clarity, copy-editing scores)
- SELF-CHECK RESULTS (5-point check)
- FIRST COMMENT (for LinkedIn, if links exist)

Omar can: APPROVE, EDIT (with notes), SKIP, or DEFER (schedule for later)

pre.message: No drafts to present — skipping approval

post.message: Omar skipped all drafts — no content to publish

steps.name: Phase 5: Publish Blog Post
steps.description: Publish blog post to Ghost (omarbakri.com) via Admin API. Falls back to markdown export for manual paste if GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY is unavailable. NOTE: Requires Ghost Admin API key (id:secret format) from the target Ghost instance — omarbakri.com may use a different key than intelligentrails.news.

actions.description: Write final blog post as markdown file (always — used as input to Ghost API and as fallback)
Publish blog post to Ghost via Admin API. Uses GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY. For omarbakri.com, update ghost_url accordingly.

config.command:
python -c "
import jwt, time, json, requests, os
content = open('/tmp/content-ops/drafts/blog-post-final.md').read()
lines = content.strip().split('\n')
title = lines[0].lstrip('# ').strip() if lines and lines[0].startswith('#') else '{{blog_title}}'
body = '\n'.join(lines[1:]).strip()
key = os.environ.get('GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY', '')
if not key or ':' not in key:
    print('GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY missing or not in id:secret format — skipping Ghost publish'); exit(0)
kid, secret = key.split(':', 1)
iat = int(time.time())
tok = jwt.encode({'iat': iat, 'exp': iat+300, 'aud': '/admin/'}, bytes.fromhex(secret), algorithm='HS256', headers={'kid': kid})
headers = {'Authorization': f'Ghost {tok}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
ghost_url = os.environ.get('GHOST_BLOG_URL', 'https://www.omarbakri.com')
payload = {'posts': [{'title': title, 'markdown': body, 'status': 'published', 'tags': [{'name': 'blog'}]}]}
r = requests.post(f'{ghost_url}/ghost/api/admin/posts/?source=markdown', headers=headers, json=payload)
print(json.dumps({'status': r.status_code, 'url': r.json().get('posts', [{}])[0].get('url', 'unknown')}))
"

actions.fallback: export_blog_markdown — instruct Omar to paste /tmp/content-ops/drafts/blog-post-final.md into Ghost editor manually

outputs.blog_export_path: Path to final blog markdown file
outputs.ghost_blog_publish_result: Ghost API response with published post URL

steps.name: Phase 5: Publish Newsletter
steps.description: Publish newsletter to intelligentrails.news via Ghost Admin API. Falls back to markdown export for manual paste if GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY is unavailable. NOTE: Ghost Admin API key must be in id:secret format (24-hex:64-hex) — NOT the Content API key. Obtain from Ghost Admin → Settings → Integrations → Add custom integration.

actions.description: Write final newsletter as markdown file (always — used as input to Ghost API and as fallback for manual paste)
Publish newsletter to Ghost (intelligentrails.news) via Admin API. Requires GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY in id:secret format.

config.command:
python -c "
import jwt, time, json, requests, os
content = open('/tmp/content-ops/drafts/newsletter-final.md').read()
lines = content.strip().split('\n')
title = lines[0].lstrip('# ').strip() if lines and lines[0].startswith('#') else '{{newsletter_subject}}'
body = '\n'.join(lines[1:]).strip()
key = os.environ.get('GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY', '')
if not key or ':' not in key:
    print('GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY missing or not in id:secret format — skipping Ghost publish'); exit(0)
kid, secret = key.split(':', 1)
iat = int(time.time())
tok = jwt.encode({'iat': iat, 'exp': iat+300, 'aud': '/admin/'}, bytes.fromhex(secret), algorithm='HS256', headers={'kid': kid})
headers = {'Authorization': f'Ghost {tok}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
payload = {'posts': [{'title': title, 'lexical': json.dumps({'root': {'children': [{'children': [{'detail': 0, 'format': 0, 'mode': 'normal', 'style': '', 'text': body, 'type': 'text', 'version': 1}], 'direction': 'ltr', 'format': '', 'indent': 0, 'type': 'paragraph', 'version': 1}], 'direction': 'ltr', 'format': '', 'indent': 0, 'type': 'root', 'version': 1}}), 'status': 'published', 'tags': [{'name': 'newsletter'}]}]}
r = requests.post('https://intelligent-rails-1.ghost.io/ghost/api/admin/posts/', headers=headers, json=payload)
print(json.dumps({'status': r.status_code, 'url': r.json().get('posts', [{}])[0].get('url', 'unknown')}))
"

actions.fallback: export_newsletter — instruct Omar to paste /tmp/content-ops/drafts/newsletter-final.md into Ghost editor manually

outputs.newsletter_export_path: Path to final newsletter markdown file
outputs.ghost_publish_result: Ghost API response with published post URL
